allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/v1/chat/query -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"question":"What is this document about?","top_k":3,"score_threshold":0.3}' --max-time 30)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('answer:', d['answer'][:80]+'...'\); print\('citations:', len\(d['citations']\)\); print\('latency_ms:', d['latency_ms']\)")
